hero.title: Your Partner in
hero.subtitle: Custom fabrication, professional installation and maintenance across Morocco. From design to installation, PROPANEL offers a complete turnkey solution.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: A complete range of signage and advertising solutions to enhance your brand image.

signaletique.name: Signage
signaletique.short: Professional indoor and outdoor signage to guide and inform.
signaletique.description: Design and manufacture of professional signage systems tailored to your specific needs. Indoor and outdoor, we create durable and aesthetic solutions.

logo3d.name: 3D Logo
logo3d.short: Relief letters and logos for a striking visual identity.
logo3d.description: Create a lasting visual impact with our 3D volume logos and letters. Made from premium materials, they enhance your company entrance.

logoInox.name: Stainless Steel Logo
logoInox.short: Cut stainless steel letters, elegant and durable.
logoInox.description: Stainless steel offers a luxurious finish and exceptional durability. Ideal for premium signs that make a lasting impression.

totemPublicitaire.name: Advertising Totem
totemPublicitaire.short: Advertising totems and pylons for maximum visibility.
totemPublicitaire.description: Advertising totems offer exceptional roadside visibility. Designed to withstand harsh weather, they are the perfect showcase for your business.

habillage.name: Facade Cladding
habillage.short: Complete facade transformation for a premium finish.
habillage.description: Give a new look to your facade with our professional cladding solutions. Tensioned fabric, composite panels, adhesive vinyl or aluminium cladding.

palissade.name: Construction Hoarding
palissade.short: Advertising hoardings and fences to showcase your construction sites.
palissade.description: Turn your construction sites into advertising supports. Our communicating hoardings combine security and brand communication throughout the works.

impression.name: Large Format Printing
impression.short: High-resolution digital printing on all media.
impression.description: Our latest-generation large format printing equipment guarantees vibrant colors and perfect resolution on all media.

menuiserie.name: Aluminium Joinery
menuiserie.short: Custom aluminium structures and frames for your signs.
menuiserie.description: Manufacture and installation of custom aluminium structures for signs, shop fronts, canopies and facades. Impeccable finish and guaranteed durability.

maintenance.name: Maintenance
maintenance.short: Maintenance and repair of your signs and lighting devices.
maintenance.description: Extend the lifespan of your installations with our preventive and corrective maintenance services. Fast response across Morocco.

whyUs.title: Why Choose PROPANEL?
whyUs.subtitle: Morocco's signage leader, combining technical expertise and creativity for exceptional results.
whyUs.reason1Desc: Over 10 years of experience in signage and outdoor advertising in Morocco. Our team masters the latest technologies.
whyUs.reason2Desc: We exclusively use high-quality materials – aluminium, stainless steel, dibond – to guarantee durability and aesthetics.
whyUs.reason3Desc: From design to installation, we manage your entire project: study, fabrication, installation and maintenance.
whyUs.reason4Desc: We commit to precise deadlines and meet them. Your business cannot wait, and we know that.
whyUs.reason5Desc: Our team operates in all cities of Morocco. Tangier, Casablanca, Rabat, Marrakech and many more.
whyUs.reason6Desc: Our relationship does not end at installation. We provide maintenance, repair and updates for your installations.

process.title: Our Work Process
process.subtitle: A structured approach for guaranteed results, from first contact to final delivery.
process.step1Desc: Analysis of your needs, site visit if necessary, and detailed commercial proposal within 48 hours.
process.step2Desc: Our graphic designers create 3D mockups and HD visuals to validate aesthetics before manufacturing.
process.step3Desc: Production in our workshop equipped with cutting-edge machines with rigorous quality control.
process.step4Desc: Professional installation by our certified team, within agreed deadlines, with site cleanup.
process.step5Desc: Reception with you, technical documentation provided and post-installation follow-up for your peace of mind.

portfolio.title: Our Projects
portfolio.subtitle: Discover some of our projects completed for clients across Morocco.

clients.title: They Trust Us
clients.subtitle: Companies from all sectors trust us for their signage needs.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Image?
cta.subtitle: Get a free quote within 24 hours. Our team is available to study your project and propose the best solution.

about.title: About PROPANEL
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner in professional signage and advertising for over 10 years.
about.storyText: Founded in Tangier, PROPANEL was born from a passion for visual communication and the conviction that every company deserves a strong visual identity. Since our beginnings, we have never stopped growing, innovating and expanding our range of services.
about.storyText2: Today, we are proud to be one of Morocco's leading signage companies, with a dedicated team, a modern workshop and a national presence.
about.value1Desc: We aim for perfection in every project, with no compromise on quality.
about.value2Desc: We continuously integrate new technologies and industry trends.
about.value3Desc: Transparency and honesty in all our business relationships.
about.value4Desc: Customer satisfaction is our absolute priority, before, during and after the project.
about.equipSubtitle: A modern workshop equipped with the latest technologies.
